name: Rya - Peculiar look upon your face
description:
"Goodness, am I still a serpent?"

It's not about that this time.

You decided to pay your friend Rya a visit, since she's one of the very few people at these wretched lands that brings you peace and comfort. When you walk into her room, you're met with the scene of a bare fat ass in the air, and the girl that carries it organizing some books on her face. Rya sees and greets you as happily as always, but she notices the weird look in your face. Concerned, she believes to have forgotten disguising her serpent appearance, but she quickly finds out that's not the think you're looking at.

AKA Zorayas

Another request for today, this one was requested by more than one person I think. Makes sense, since she's probably the cutest girl on the entire game. I'm still not fully convinced about the main pic though, so I may change it one of these days.

(Character from Elden Ring)

Thumbnail generated by me using Taigerarts style.
